name: chronoprivative-backend
description: Backend API para ChronoPrivative — diário privado retro/cyberpunk

scripts.seed: node -e "const{Pool}=require('pg');const bcrypt=require('bcrypt');require('dotenv').config();const pool=new Pool({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL});(async()=>{const hash=await bcrypt.hash(process.env.ADMIN_PASSWORD||'admin',12);await pool.query('INSERT INTO users(username,password_hash,role) VALUES($1,$2,$3) ON CONFLICT(username) DO NOTHING',['admin',hash,'admin']);console.log('Seed concluído!');pool.end();})();"
